race.comment: DIRTY HABITS (2) was a touch slow into stride on debut but showed enough late in the race behind a smart one to suggest he wouldn't be a maiden for long. He'll be fitter for a recent trial coming into this and Fiore has been with him the whole way through. Can return with a bang. SMILING WAR BANDIT (4) was just fair on debut but looks to have come back an improved commodity this time. His latest trial with Corver on board was solid, with the Blinkers going on there and staying on for his return effort here. Wouldn't surprise to see him return on a positive note. BOOKENDS (5) gets the Blinkers on for the first time today after going under as the race favourite last start. This shapes favourably for her as she comes back in trip today and she looks a leading chance. ZERO TO SIXTY (1) is third-up now and comes back to 1100m. Drawn well and can feature. BRICINI (6) can improve with the fresh run under her belt and won't be far away.
